text:
Several competitors in the 2024 Paris Olympics can also call themselves Washington State Cougars. Some former and current Cougars are competing in the track and field portion of the games, which officially kicks off on August 1. Follow the Cougars below. All Olympic events are streaming on Peacock and on NBCOlympics.com.

If no results are noted, then they have yet to be determined.

400 Meter Hurdles

Round 1 - August 5, 1:05 AM PT/4:05 AM ETÂ(Results - 48.64, 2nd place in Heat 3, qualified for semi-final))

Repechage Round - August 5, 3:00 AM PT/6:05 AM ET(Did not participate, already qualified for semi-final)

Semi-Final - August 7, 10:35 AM PT/1:35 PM ET(Results - 48.44 seconds, 4th place in Heat 2, did not qualify for final)

Final - August 9, 12:45 PM PT/3:45 PM PT(Did not qualify)

100 Meter Hurdles

Round 1 - August 7, 1:15 AM PT/4:15 AM ETÂ(Results - 13.05 seconds, 8th place in Heat 1, Caicedo moves to repechage round)

Repechage Round - August 8 1:35 AM PT/4:35 AM ET(Results - 12.828 seconds, 2nd place in Heat 2, qualified for semi-final)

Semi-Final - August 9 3:05 AM PT/6:05 AM ET(Results - 12.67 seconds, 4th place in Heat 3, did not qualify for final)

Final - August 10 10:45 AM PT/1:35 PM PT

4x400 Relay

Round 1 - August 9, 1:40 AM PT/4:40 AM ET(Team ran 3:25.77 and qualified for final, but Nijjar did not run)

Final - August 10, 12:22 PM PT/3:22 PM ET

100 Meter Hurdles

Round 1 - August 7, 1:15 AM PT/4:15 AM ETÂ (Results - 12.78 seconds, 4th place in Heat 3, qualified for semi-final)

Repechage Round - August 8 1:35 AM PT/4:35 AM ET(Did not participate, already qualified for semi-final)

Semi-Final - August 9 3:05 AM PT/6:05 AM ET(Results -  12.63 seconds, 3rd in Heat 2. does not qualify for semi-final)

Final - August 10 10:45 AM PT/1:35 PM ET(Did not qualify)

Triple Jump

Qualification - August 2, 11:15 AM PT/2:15 PM ET(Results - Group B 9th Place, Attempt 1: 14.01, Attempt 2: 13.98, Attempt 3: 13.71)

Final - August 3, 11:20 AM PT/2:20 PM ET(Taylor Did Not Qualify)

Note: Former Washington State athlete Louie Hinchliffe, now competing for the University of Houston, will represent Great Britain in the 100m dash, as well as in the 4x100m relay team.

Joe Londergan joined the SI brand in 2023 with G5 Football Daily. With over 15 years of experience in covering and working directly in college and pro sports, Joe's expertise has been featured in Front Office Sports, SB Nation, and XRAY.FM. He is a member of both the Football Writers' Association of America and the National Collegiate Baseball Writers' Association.

Joe holds a bachelor's degree from the University of Louisville and a master's degree in sports administration from Seattle University. Outside of his writing career, Joe enjoys golfing, although he admits that while he hits driver decently, his short game is a liability.

title: Washington State Cougars Track & Field - 2024 Olympics Schedule & Results
description: A handful of current and former Cougars will be racing for gold medals in Paris
